scripts.smoke:trigger: node -e "fetch(process.env.INNGEST_EVENT_URL || 'https://api.inngest.com/v1/events', { method: 'POST', headers: { Authorization: 'Bearer ' + process.env.INNGEST_SIGNING_KEY, 'Content-Type': 'application/json' }, body: JSON.stringify({ name: 'biassemble/smoke-e2e' }) }).then(r => r.ok ? console.log('Smoke E2E triggered') : console.error('Failed:', r.status)).catch(console.error)"
